title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at V-Mart Retail

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Store Manager at V-Mart Retail
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with V-Mart Retail! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Agra team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About V-Mart Retail:
V-Mart Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with V-Mart Retail!
